summary: Frontend testing of Instagram component integrations (VoiceMessagePlayer, MessageReactions, ImageFilters, CarouselPost) into the main UI. All integrations verified working correctly.

issues: WebSocket connection warning on page load (non-blocking): 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established'

passed_tests: Home page loads with FaceConnect logo and feed
Stories bar visible with 'Your story' option
Feed shows posts correctly
CreateMenu opens via sidebar 'Create' button
CreateMenu shows all 6 options: Post, Story, Reel, Live, Scan, AI
Post creation UI shows Gallery button
Post creation UI shows Multiple button (carousel support)
Post creation UI shows Camera button
Post creation UI supports Filters
Chat page loads with conversation list
ChatView opens when clicking on a conversation
ChatView shows message input with 'Type a message...' placeholder
ChatView has emoji-btn (data-testid='emoji-btn')
ChatView has unified-attach-btn (data-testid='unified-attach-btn')
MessageReactions component integrated - SmilePlus icons present on messages (2 found)
Messages have reaction buttons per MessageReactions component
CarouselPost imported in Home.jsx (line 16)
CarouselPost rendered for carousel type posts (Home.jsx line 269-275)
ImageFilterPicker imported in CreateMenu.jsx (line 25)
CarouselCreator imported in CreateMenu.jsx (line 26)
VoiceMessagePlayer imported in ChatView.jsx (line 28)
MessageReactions imported in ChatView.jsx (line 29)
critical_code_review_comments: VoiceMessagePlayer integration at ChatView.jsx lines 754-773 - renders for audio type messages that include 'Voice message' or 'voice_' in filename
MessageReactions integration at ChatView.jsx lines 1175-1226 - renders SmilePlus reaction picker button for each non-deleted message
CarouselPost integration in Home.jsx lines 269-275 - renders carousel for posts with type='carousel' and media_items array
ImageFilterPicker shown in CreateMenu when image selected and Filters button clicked (line 519-525)
CarouselCreator shown in CreateMenu when multiple images selected for post creation (line 427-446)
seed_data_creation: Existing conversation with test1@example.com user used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Instagram component integrations verified working: VoiceMessagePlayer renders for audio messages, MessageReactions shows SmilePlus icon on each message for adding reactions, ImageFilterPicker shows when Filters button clicked in post creation, CarouselCreator shows when multiple images selected. WebSocket warning is a known non-blocking issue from previous iterations.

VoiceMessagePlayer.condition: message.message_type === 'audio' AND (content includes 'Voice message' OR filename includes 'voice_')

MessageReactions.verified: 2 SmilePlus icons found in chat view, reaction buttons present
